title: thelymitra exigua
intro: Thelymitra exigua is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra exigua are said to include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. However, there is limited scientific evidence to support these claims, and the plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions made from its roots or flowers.
